title: valeriana edulis subsp. procera
intro: Valeriana edulis subsp. procera is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae, commonly known as the Valerian plant. This plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including its sedative and calming effects, which are attributed to the presence of valepotriates and isovaleric acid. The health benefits of Valeriana edulis subsp. procera include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation and improving sleep quality, as well as acting as a natural remedy for menstrual cramps and digestive issues. Valerian root is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
